compiled_state.title: sprint-list-epics.sh: ticket-init.sh failures are silently swallowed — no diagnostic output when init fails
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause is clear from code inspection: line 46 of sprint-list-epics.sh uses '2>/dev/null || true' which silently swallows ticket-init.sh failures.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
